summary: Comprehensive testing of Featured Listing boost functionality completed successfully. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate for boost features). Frontend UI components fully functional with boost modal, package selection, and Stripe integration working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/boost/packages returns 3 packages (basic $5, standard $7.50, premium $10)
POST /api/boost/checkout creates Stripe checkout session with valid session_id
GET /api/boost/status/{session_id} returns correct payment status (unpaid/open)
GET /api/boost/my-boosts returns user's active boosts
Spotlight page shows 'Boost a Product' CTA button correctly
Boost CTA button redirects to marketplace as expected
Marketplace page shows boost buttons for product owners
Boost modal opens with correct product information
All three boost packages (Basic, Standard, Premium) display correctly in modal
Package selection works - users can select different packages
Boost benefits section displays correctly in modal
Checkout button shows correct pricing based on selected package
Stripe integration works - successfully redirects to Stripe checkout
Stripe checkout page loads with correct amount ($10.00 for Premium)
Modal close functionality works correctly
Featured Listing badge appears in Spotlight Award Categories
Boost packages API accessible from frontend
User authentication required for boost functionality
Product ownership validation works (boost buttons only for owned products)
Responsive design works correctly for boost modal

success_percentage.integration: 100% (Stripe integration and full boost flow working)
